deliverable: An on-chain escrow works like a digital middleman that holds funds in a secure smart contract until both sides complete their part of the deal. Because the money is locked away neutrally, neither party can take it without fulfilling the agreed-upon conditions. This way, even strangers who don't trust each other can trade safely.

verdict.reason: The deliverable is three clear sentences in plain language, explains how an on-chain escrow enables safe transactions between untrusting parties, and explicitly mentions the neutral escrow holding funds.

task: Write a clear 2-3 sentence explanation, for a non-expert, of how an on-chain escrow lets two agents who don't trust each other transact safely.
criteria: Plain language, 2-3 sentences, mentions the neutral escrow holding funds.
